title: OAuth2 URL missing HTTPS protocol
symptom: When setting up OAuth2 for services like Twitter or CloudConvert, the generated URLs lack the 'https://' protocol, causing authentication failures.
applies_when: Using OAuth2 for Twitter or CloudConvert
n8n is configured with a domain
not_this_if: OAuth2 setup is working for other services
root_cause: n8n's configuration may not specify the full URL including the protocol, leading to generated OAuth URLs that are incomplete and thus fail during the authorization process.
fix_steps: Set the WEBHOOK_URL environment variable to include 'https://', e.g., 'WEBHOOK_URL=https://example.com/'
Restart n8n to apply the configuration changes.
agent_instruction: Ensure the WEBHOOK_URL includes 'https://' and restart n8n.
